field_rules.scene_graph: Must describe characters, environment, props, actions, object relationships, depth order, lighting context, and negative constraints.
field_rules.camera_plan: Must include shot type, lens/look, camera height, distance, angle, crop/framing, full-body/half-body requirement, depth of field, and occlusion warnings.
field_rules.mask_plan: Must include macro/major/minor/micro/nano masks when needed; contact masks require source, target, contact-zone, falloff, and no-bleed QA.
field_rules.model_selection_plan: Must reference model registry IDs, engine families, source metadata, hash/S3/local/EC2 status, Civitai metadata when available, and allowed pass scope.
field_rules.engine_route: Must use Wave06 engine IDs and never direct-mix incompatible latent/model/LoRA families.
field_rules.pass_plan: Must be ordered, engine-bound, module-bound, reversible, and QA-gated.
field_rules.qa_goal_plan: Must define pass/fail checks before generation and expected evidence after generation.
